name: Texas Instruments Incorporated
description: Texas Instruments Incorporated (TI) is a global semiconductor company that designs, manufactures, tests, and sells analog and embedded processing chips for markets such as industrial, automotive, personal electronics, communications equipment, and enterprise systems. As a pioneer in the semiconductor industry, TI focuses on developing technology that makes electronics more affordable through semiconductors that are more efficient, reliable, and accessible. The company operates manufacturing facilities worldwide, including significant wafer fabrication and assembly-and-test operations, while maintaining a strong commitment to innovation and long-term internal manufacturing capacity expansion.

investment_theses.company_type: Analog & Embedded Processing / US Manufacturing Expansion
